rules.rule: Every .cs file must be named using PascalCase followed by the .cs extension.
Partial class files must be named {RootClass}.{Aspect}.cs using a dot separator.
Partial class files with a sub-aspect must be named {RootClass}.{Aspect}.{SubAspect}.cs.
File names must not use camelCase, all-lowercase, underscores, or hyphens as word separators.
Partial class file names must not concatenate aspects without a dot separator.
